name: ad-detection-system
description: CV-Based Detection of Unauthorized Street Advertisements — monorepo root

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend"
